reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Regularmente es común hacer cola para cargar combustible. Ha quedado chica para la demanda, sobre todo en periodo estival o fin de semana largo. El drugstore no está abierto las 24hs.
Sería bueno mejorar una estación que se encuentra sobre Ruta N22

(Translated by Google)
It's common to have long lines to get fuel. The station is too small to meet demand, especially during the summer or long weekends. The convenience store isn't open 24 hours.
It would be good to improve the station located on Route N22.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bk5EU1BnEAE

reviews.comment:
El encargado de la estación de servicio es un mal educado. Quisimos desayunar para festejar el cumpleaños de uno de mis hijos y no dejó que ingresemos al local porque a pesar de querer comprar todo ahí, como teníamos un budín como torta nos echó. No nos permitió explicarle la situación, y simplemente se limitó a un "afuera!" Esto fue el martes 5/3/16 a las 9:30 h.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendant is rude. We wanted to have breakfast to celebrate one of my sons' birthday, and he wouldn't let us in because, despite wanting to buy everything there, he kicked us out since we had a pudding cake. He didn't let us explain the situation, and simply said, "Get out!" This was on Tuesday, March 5, 2016, at 9:30 a.m.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURna04yMFBBEAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños no están muy limpios y no pertenece a las estaciones de servicio full. Hay otra ypf a 600 metros que es ypf full.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms aren't very clean, and it's not a full-service station. There's another YPF station 600 meters away that is a full-service station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBaFp1MjF3RRAB
